info.title: FlashNX
info.author: Jonathan8520
info.description: Play your Flash (.swf) games on Switch, powered by Ruffle.
info.details: FlashNX is a homebrew Flash player for the Nintendo Switch, powered by Ruffle. Play your .swf games (AS1/AS2 and partial AS3) straight from your SD card. Features a joycon-navigable game library, in-game remappable controls (48 Flash keys, with a global default), native game saves (.sol), remote import from archive.org over HTTPS, and a UI available in English, French, Spanish and Russian (auto-detected from the console language). Heavy games may be limited by Ruffle's ActionScript interpreter (CPU-bound, no JIT). Atmosphère required. Powered by Ruffle (ruffle.rs); all Flash emulation credit goes to the Ruffle project.

changelog: v1.1.0: UI now in English, French, Spanish and Russian (auto-detected, switchable in the new + Settings screen), global default controls, URL history management, and UI polish. v1.0.0: First official release. Flash playback (AS1/AS2 + partial AS3) via Ruffle, joycon library UI, remappable controls, native .sol saves, archive.org HTTPS import.
